purpose: Review the RX.2b graphical foundation coverage report and decide whether any CLI-only unit mutation may proceed for the basic graphical representation-reading queue.
required_procedure_standard_for_foundati: Check axis, legend, or category labels.
Decide whether exact reading, estimation, or interpolation is required.

review_questions.question: Is the graphical foundation queue complete enough for bar, line, pie, percentage-change, and index-reading basics?
options: C. No, hold and expand the queue

review_questions.question: Are A62, A63, and A64 acceptable as representation-reading foundation units with explicit context, labels, units, scale, exact/estimated reading, and interpolation steps?
options: C. No, procedures are too thin

review_questions.question: Is A65 justified as a composed share-times-total unit after A64 and A04?
options: B. Yes, but revise needs or wording

review_questions.question: Are A68, A69, and A73 sufficiently grounded for mutation review?
options: C. No, hold all composed visual calculations

review_questions.question: Is A71 safe to mutate now, or should it remain held because pie-chart percentage-change composition is high risk?
options: B. Hold A71 for later review

review_questions.question: Should the provisional IDs A62/A63/A64/A65/A68/A69/A73 and conditional A71 be preserved with gaps?
options: C. Decide only at execution time

review_questions.question: Does the dependency order work without unresolved needs or cycles if approved candidates are applied in the proposed order?
options: C. No, revise order or needs

review_questions.question: Does the graphical foundation coverage report clearly distinguish live, candidate, held/high-risk, missing/not-scoped, and generator-blocked skills?
options: B. Mostly, with report wording fixes
C. No, revise report before closure

review_questions.question: Are all newly approved A-units to remain generator-blocked/non-interactive until RX.6 generator implementation and validation?
What gate status should GATE-RX2b-graphical-foundation receive?
